strategy: Solve the puzzle before you attack. He opens with a Quasi-Invulnerability Aura making him immune to six of the seven schools; only one random school can hurt him.
Listen to his first six shouts. Each names a school he is immune to, so the single school he never names is the one you can damage.
Bring prisms so your hitter can convert to whichever school turns out to be the weak one, and set up blades while you wait out the shouts.
Never hit with an immune school. It triggers a Shadow-enhanced AoE on the whole team based on that school.
Never Dispel him or remove his aura. It resets the puzzle, gives him a fresh aura, and fires a Glowbug Squall for 50% of everyone's max Health.

At 24,140 Health, run this Raid as a team with a flexible prism hitter. Note the four inspired-cast spells from the surrounding bosses carry into this fight, and enter on time to avoid the late-join Storm Shark.
cheatNotes: The inspired-cast spells you earned from the four bosses around Mr. Ghastly carry into this fight, so bring them.
Round 1 he casts a Quasi-Invulnerability Aura making him immune to six of the seven schools; the one vulnerable school is random each time.
Over his first six turns he names schools he is immune to, so the single school he never names is the one that can damage him; listen before you commit a hit.
'I am steaming mad right now' means he is immune to Fire this fight.
'Play it cool' means he is immune to Ice.
'Even the fish of the seas fear the tempest' means he is immune to Storm.
'I sure hope you do not CONJURE the solution' means he is immune to Myth.
'What is the secret of Life' means he is immune to Life.
'I have a sudden fear of my own mortality' means he is immune to Death.
'I hate sand. Too dry' means he is immune to Balance.
Hit him with a school he is immune to and he retaliates with a Shadow-enhanced AoE on the whole team based on that school, so only swing once you know the weak school.
Dispelling him or removing his aura resets the puzzle, gives him a new aura, and fires a Glowbug Squall for 50% of everyone's max Health, so never Dispel him.
A wizard who joins after the first turn eats a Storm Shark for 25% of their max Health, so enter on time.
